name: XAUUSD Session Breakout (ORB-proxy)
description: Session-anchored momentum breakout on spot gold. Intended to run with a session filter restricting entries to LONDON_OPEN and NY_AM windows. Enters long when close breaks above the 20-period EMA with above-average volume and price also above VWAP; mirrored short. ATR-anchored risk. This is a v1 proxy for a true opening-range breakout; a true ORB requires engine-level opening-range tracking per session.
